penalties.description: This appears to be an instructional video rather than a timed performance. No actual task completion with timing start and end points is visible.

consensus_score.reasoning: Fundamental disagreement on video content type. Claude identified this as an instructional video without scoreable performance, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task. Given the absence of clear timing markers and the educational context described by Claude, this appears to be training material rather than a performance attempt.

disagreements.rationale: Without clear start/end timing markers visible in an instructional context, completion time cannot be reliably determined
